text: Except as otherwise provided in this division, it is an infraction to fail to comply with any rule or regulation adopted by the department pursuant to this division.

# Vehicle Code
## Division 14.8. SAFETY REGULATIONS [34500 - 34520.5]
##### § 34506.3

Except as otherwise provided in this division, it is an infraction to fail to comply with any rule or regulation adopted by the department pursuant to this division.

*(Amended by Stats. 1991, Ch. 298, Sec. 2.)*

subsections.text: Except as otherwise provided in this division, it is an infraction to fail to comply with any rule or regulation adopted by the department pursuant to this division.
